brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Silver zone transformation of Karpathy AI exposure data. Reads 342 rows from bronze.karpathy_ai_exposure and cross-references base.bls_ooh for SOC resolution. Normalizes SOC codes (whitespace strip, XX-XXXX format validation), resolves null SOC codes via case-insensitive title matching against BLS occupation titles (exact match then substring match), expands broad SOC codes (XX-XXX0) to all detailed codes found in BLS OOH (with broad-to-broad exact match detection for 4 codes that exist as broad in BLS), deduplicates by soc_code keeping highest num_jobs_2024 (slug tiebreaker), computes deterministic record_id via grain hash, and derives bls_match and soc_resolved_method classification fields. Output: 419 rows promoted to base.karpathy_ai_exposure.

documentation.description: Transform Bronze Karpathy AI exposure scores into Silver base table. Four-stage SOC resolution pipeline: (1) normalize SOC codes by stripping whitespace and validating XX-XXXX format, (2) resolve null SOC codes via title matching against base.bls_ooh occupation titles using exact case-insensitive match then bidirectional substring match, (3) expand broad SOC codes (XX-XXX0 pattern) to all detailed BLS OOH codes sharing the same 6-char prefix (with special handling for 4 broad codes that exist as-is in BLS), (4) post-expansion deduplication by soc_code keeping the row with highest num_jobs_2024 and alphabetical slug tiebreaker. Derives bls_match boolean and soc_resolved_method enum (direct, title_match, broad_expansion, unresolved). Computes deterministic record_id via compute_grain_id on soc_code (prefix 'kai') or slug for null-SOC rows. Drops Bronze cross-validation fields (median_pay_annual, num_jobs_2024, entry_education, source_url, source_method). Promotes via idempotent append with dedup on record_id.

inputDatasetFacets.description: Used for SOC cross-validation, title-based SOC resolution, and broad SOC code expansion. Not joined row-for-row; used to build three lookup structures: bls_soc_set (all SOC codes), bls_title_lookup (lowercase title -> soc_code), and bls_prefix_map (6-char prefix -> list of detailed SOC codes).

record_id.transformationDescription: Deterministic grain hash via compute_grain_id(). For rows with non-null soc_code: hash of soc_code with prefix 'kai'. For rows with null soc_code: hash of slug with prefix 'kai'. The soc_code used is the post-transformation value (after normalization, title matching, or broad expansion), not the raw Bronze value.

soc_code.transformationDescription: Multi-path resolution: (1) DIRECT path: Bronze soc_code stripped of whitespace and validated against XX-XXXX regex. Valid non-broad codes pass through. (2) TITLE_MATCH path: when Bronze soc_code is null, occupation_title is matched case-insensitively against base.bls_ooh titles (exact match first, then bidirectional substring match). May produce multiple rows per input if multiple BLS titles match. (3) BROAD_EXPANSION path: broad SOC codes (XX-XXX0) are expanded to all detailed BLS OOH codes sharing the same 6-char prefix, creating one row per detailed code. Exception: 4 broad codes that exist as-is in BLS are kept as direct matches. (4) UNRESOLVED: invalid format or no match found yields null soc_code.

slug.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. Kebab-case occupation identifier. Used as fallback grain field for record_id when soc_code is null.

occupation_title.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. Also used as input to title_match() for SOC resolution, but the field value itself is unchanged.

category.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. Karpathy occupation category grouping.

exposure_score.transformationDescription: Coerced to int via int() cast. AI exposure score on 0-10 scale from Karpathy LLM evaluation.

rationale.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. LLM-generated explanation of the exposure score.

bls_match.transformationDescription: Boolean flag: True if the resolved soc_code (after normalization, title matching, or broad expansion) exists in the base.bls_ooh SOC code set. False for unresolved rows (null soc_code) and for valid SOC codes not found in BLS. For broad_expansion rows, always True by construction (expanded codes are drawn from BLS). For title_match rows, True if the matched SOC exists in BLS (which it always does since matches come from the BLS title lookup).

soc_resolved_method.transformationDescription: Enum classification of how the output soc_code was determined. Values: 'direct' (Bronze SOC valid and non-broad, OR broad code found as-is in BLS), 'title_match' (null Bronze SOC resolved via occupation_title matching against BLS titles), 'broad_expansion' (broad SOC XX-XXX0 expanded to detailed BLS codes), 'unresolved' (null SOC with no title match, invalid SOC format, or broad SOC with no detailed codes in BLS).

source_load_date.transformationDescription: Column rename from 'load_date' to 'source_load_date'. Preserves the Bronze zone ingest date. No value transformation.

ingested_at.transformationDescription: UTC timestamp generated at Silver transformation time via datetime.datetime.now(tz=datetime.timezone.utc). Independent of Bronze ingested_at. Represents when this Silver row was created.

median_pay_annual.reason: Bronze cross-validation field from occupations.csv. Not needed in Silver zone; BLS OOH provides authoritative wage data.

num_jobs_2024.reason: Bronze cross-validation field from occupations.csv. Used internally during deduplication (highest num_jobs_2024 wins) but not persisted to Silver schema. Stored as temporary _num_jobs_2024 field and removed before promotion.

entry_education.reason: Bronze cross-validation field from occupations.csv. Not needed in Silver zone; BLS OOH provides authoritative education data.

source_url.reason: Raw metadata field from Bronze ingestion. Not carried to Silver zone.

source_method.reason: Raw metadata field from Bronze ingestion. Not carried to Silver zone.

ingested_at (bronze).reason: Bronze ingestion timestamp replaced by Silver-specific ingested_at. Bronze timestamp not preserved.

rowCountLineage.description: 342 Bronze rows -> 419 Silver rows. Row count increases due to: (1) broad SOC expansion creates ~70 new rows (one per detailed BLS code for each broad input code), (2) title matching can create multiple rows when multiple BLS titles match one Karpathy occupation (~28 rows). Post-expansion deduplication by soc_code (highest num_jobs_2024 wins) removes some duplicates. Net effect: ~77 additional rows.
